role: Former Head of SPND (Organisation of Defensive Innovation and Research)
bio: Brigadier General Reza Mozaffari Nia was an [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) officer who served as a director of [SPND](/orgs/spnd) — the Organisation of Defensive Innovation and Research — the classified Iranian body widely assessed as continuing [Mohsen Fakhrizadeh](/people/mohsen-fakhrizadeh)'s covert nuclear weapons research programme. He was among the most senior figures in Iran's clandestine nuclear weapons infrastructure, overseeing SPND during a period of significant activity flagged by the IAEA. He was succeeded as SPND director by [Hossein Jabal Amelian](/people/hossein-jabal-amelian). Mozaffari Nia was killed on 28 February 2026 in Israeli airstrikes targeting Iran's nuclear and military leadership.
